zh.lifeSummary: Bernard de Ventadour於1310年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰可雷。他於1338年5月17日與Marguerite de Beaumont在法國努維勒-阿吉泰可雷結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1390年5月2日在法國努維勒-阿吉泰可雷圖勒享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Bernard de Ventadour于1310年出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰可雷。他于1338年5月17日与Marguerite de Beaumont在法国努維勒-阿吉泰可雷结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1390年5月2日在法国努維勒-阿吉泰可雷圖勒享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bernard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of three famous medieval churchmen: St Bernard of Menthon ( 923–1008 ), founder of a hospice on each of the Alpine passes named after him; the monastic reformer St Bernard of Clairvaux ( 1090–1153 ); and the scholastic philosopher Bernard of Chartres. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. A native Old English form, Beornheard, was superseded by the Norman form.

en.lifeSummary: Bernard de Ventadour was born in 1310, in Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. He married Marguerite de Beaumont on 17 May 1338, in Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 2 May 1390, in Tulle, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Bernard de Ventadour est né en 1310, à Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. Il a épousé Marguerite de Beaumont le 17 mai 1338, à Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 2 mai 1390, à Tulle, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Bernard de Ventadour wurde 1310 in Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren. Er hat am 17. Mai 1338 in Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich Marguerite de Beaumont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 2. Mai 1390 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Tulle, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Bernard de Ventadour è nato il nel 1310 nel Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Lui sposato Marguerite de Beaumont il 17 maggio 1338, nel Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 2 maggio 1390, nel Tulle, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Bernard de Ventadourは1310年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインコルeズで生まれた。1338年5月17日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインコルeズでMarguerite de Beaumontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1390年5月2日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインコルeズトゥルで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bernard de Ventadour(은)는 1310년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 코e즈에서 태어났다. 그는 1338년 5월 17일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 코e즈에서 Marguerite de Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1390년 5월 2일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 코e즈 투에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Bernard de Ventadour nasceu em 1310, em Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França. Ele casou-se com Marguerite de Beaumont em 17 de maio de 1338, em Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de maio de 1390, em Tulle, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Bernard de Ventadour родился в 1310 г. в местности коррeз, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. Он женился на женщине по имени Marguerite de Beaumont 17 мая 1338 г. в местности коррeз, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 2 мая 1390 г. в местности тулл, коррeз, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Bernard de Ventadour nació en 1310, en Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Se casó con Marguerite de Beaumont el 17 de mayo de 1338, en Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 2 de mayo de 1390, en Tulle, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 80 años.
